# kAuthorizationRuleIsAdmin

**Global Variable**

Indicates a delegate rule definition constant specifying that the user must be an administrator.

## Declaration

```swift
var kAuthorizationRuleIsAdmin: String { get }
```
title: kAuthorizationRuleIsAdmin
